title: Lucid (LCID) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lucid (LCID) Q1 2026 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Metrics. Revenue & Profitability: Q1 2026 revenue: $282 million (20% YoY growth). Net loss: ~$1 billion (vs. $366 million in Q1 2025). Gross margin: -110.4% (vs. -80.7% in Q4 2025). Production & Deliveries: Production: 5,500 vehicles (149% YoY increase). Deliveries: 3,093 vehicles (flat YoY). Inventory: $1.47 billion with $200 million in impairments. Guidance & Expectations. Management suspended prior guidance pending incoming CEO Silvio Napoli's strategic review. Key outlook points: Production and CapEx guidance will be updated at Q2 earnings call. Midsize platform production ramp remains targeted for 2027. Robotaxi launch timeline unchanged for late 2026. Major Business Developments. Uber Partnership Expansion: Robotaxi commitment increased to minimum 35,000 vehicles (from 20,000). Uber investment raised to $500 million (from $300 million). Capital Raise & Liquidity: $1.05 billion raised post-quarter. Pro forma liquidity: $4.7 billion. Cost Reduction. Management announced aggressive cost reduction program targeting $500 million in headcount savings over three years.
